title: 22:26 芒聙聰 September 29, 2022
body_text:
22:26 芒聙聰 September 29, 2022
Changes to CPA Rule H1 芒聙聯 AFT Documentation Updates
Further to our
notification
, we updated the Payment Solutions Manual and AFT agreements to align with changes to CPA Rule H1, Pre-authorized Debits (PADs).
AFT Volume
Introduction to AFT Part
Section 2.1, Definitions
Added 芒聙聹one time芒聙聺 to the definition for a Sporadic PAD.
Section 5.5, Enrolling in AFT Service for PADs
We removed references to 芒聙聹electronic芒聙聺 and 芒聙聹paper芒聙聺 since there is no distinction between paper or electronic agreements.
Section 5.6, Obtaining Payor芒聙聶s PAD Agreements
We incorporated relevant information from Section 5.7, Electronic Payor芒聙聶s PAD Agreements.
Section 5.7, Electronic Payor芒聙聶s PAD Agreements
We removed this section since there is no distinction between paper or electronic agreements; and we renumbered the remaining sections in this Chapter.
Section 6.2, Providing Notification of PADs
We added that a recorded record of authorization must be retained for at least 12 months (same as a written record).
Section 6.3, Sporadic PADs
We added 芒聙聹one time芒聙聺 to the examples for a Sporadic PAD.
AFT Returns and AFT Notice of Change Transactions Part
Section 1.3, Recourse Deadlines
We updated the Rule H1 referenced section numbers. We clarified that a Payor can provide either an authorized written or a recorded reimbursement claim.
Section 7.2, Handling Disputed PADs
We clarified that you can request a signed reimbursement claim or a recorded equivalent; and that a recorded claim must be retained for a minimum of 12 months (same as a written claim).

We added the terms 芒聙聹Acknowledgement芒聙聺, 芒聙聹Commercially Reasonable Methods芒聙聺, 芒聙聹One-Time芒聙聺, 芒聙聹Payor芒聙聶s PAD Agreement芒聙聺, and 芒聙聹Recorded芒聙聺.
